name: Bay Bugs Pan Seared on Noodles with Chilli Oils
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles.
2. Wok fry onion, speck, capsicum, shallots, smoked eel, and peas. Add noodles and toss until hot.
3. Pan sear cleaned bug tails.
4. Place noodle mix on a plate. Arrange bugs on top of the noodles.
5. In a clean wok, add chili and turmeric. Cook lightly until turmeric and chili begin to stick.
6. Strain the oil and pour around the plate and on the bugs.
7. Add splashes of sweet soy sauce and garnish with a sprig of coriander.
